description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Black bag with a soft upper that has thread detailing Has a short shoulder strap One main zipped compartment with a zipped pocket inside Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 36 cm  Width: 38 cm
